ontology.foodon_gap_note: FoodOn has a general chicken drumstick entry; the baked-without-skin preparation variant is not separately coded. Closest defensible match used.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A00LC covers cooked chicken meat broadly; a drumstick-specific skinless baked code does not exist. Closest defensible code used.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No specific SNOMED CT code identified for baked skinless chicken drumstick; left null to maintain ontology honesty.

serving.natural_language_portion: One medium baked skinless chicken drumstick with bone weighs approximately 85 g edible plus bone; the edible meat portion is roughly 60–65 g.

nutrient_source.title: Chicken, drumstick, meat only, cooked, roasted — Singapore Food Composition Database (HPB Foodo)
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Input record cr_id F11010011 is sourced directly from the HPB Singapore Foodo food composition database with a confidence of 0.95 and review_status reviewed. All per-100g macro and micronutrient values (energy, protein, fat, carbohydrate, sugar, sodium, dietary fibre, potassium, calcium, iron, cholesterol) are taken verbatim from this HPB record. Saturated fat (2.0 g), monounsaturated fat (2.66 g), polyunsaturated fat (1.62 g), and trans fat (0.05 g) are supplemented from USDA FoodData Central FDC ID 171477 (Chicken, drumstick, meat only, cooked, roasted), an approved secondary source, as HPB does not separately report fatty acid fractions for this entry; these values are consistent with the total fat of 7.41 g/100 g reported by HPB.

gi_source.title: Glycemic index not applicable — negligible carbohydrate content confirmed per HPB Singapore Foodo and USDA FoodData Central FDC ID 171477
gi_source.organization: Health Promotion Board (HPB), Singapore; USDA FoodData Central
gi_source.source_match_notes: Baked skinless chicken drumstick contains 0 g carbohydrate per 100 g as confirmed by HPB Singapore Foodo (cr_id F11010011) and corroborated by USDA FoodData Central FDC ID 171477. Glycemic index is not applicable as this food contains negligible carbohydrates. No GI value exists or is needed; glycemic_index is set to null and gi_category to not_applicable. Glycemic load per serving is 0.0 by definition. The University of Sydney GI Database does not list pure protein/fat foods such as plain cooked chicken as they are outside the scope of GI testing.

hypertension.key_factor: Low sodium (86 mg/100 g) with favourable potassium-to-sodium ratio (243 mg K : 86 mg Na)
hypertension.guidance: Baked skinless chicken drumstick is suitable for hypertensive individuals due to its low sodium content of 86 mg/100 g and a potassium level of 243 mg/100 g that supports blood pressure regulation; avoid salt-heavy marinades or sauces and season with herbs instead.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: Zero carbohydrate and zero sugar; high protein (28.93 g/100 g) supports satiety and glycaemic neutrality
type2_diabetes.guidance: With 0 g carbohydrate and 0 g sugar, baked skinless chicken drumstick has no glycaemic impact and is an excellent protein source for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes; avoid high-sugar glazes or sauces that would add carbohydrate load.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Moderate total fat (7.41 g/100 g) with saturated fat approximately 2 g/100 g, well below the 5 g threshold; cholesterol 89 mg/100 g is moderate
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Baked skinless chicken drumstick is a lean, high-protein option with low saturated fat (~2 g/100 g) and is appropriate for cardiovascular disease management when prepared without added fats or high-sodium sauces; moderate cholesterol content (89 mg/100 g) is acceptable within a balanced dietary pattern.

rheumatoid_arthritis.key_factor: Absence of positive anti-inflammatory factors (no omega-3s, no antioxidants, no polyphenols, no fibre, no fermented components)
rheumatoid_arthritis.guidance: Baked skinless chicken drumstick is not contraindicated for rheumatoid arthritis but provides no positive anti-inflammatory benefit; pair with anti-inflammatory foods such as omega-3-rich fish, turmeric, or ginger to improve the meal's RA profile.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Baked chicken drumstick without skin is a cooked dark-meat poultry product prepared from the lower leg portion of the chicken. The skin is removed before or after baking, and the drumstick is oven-roasted until the exterior is golden and the interior is fully cooked through, yielding a tender, juicy texture with a mild savoury flavour. Per 100 g, it delivers 190 kcal, 28.93 g of high-quality complete protein, 7.41 g of total fat (approximately 2 g saturated), 0 g carbohydrate, 0 g sugar, 86 mg sodium, and 243 mg potassium. The absence of carbohydrate makes it glycaemically neutral and suitable for low-carbohydrate, ketogenic, and diabetic dietary patterns. Its high protein density supports muscle maintenance, satiety, and metabolic health. The low sodium and favourable potassium-to-sodium ratio make it appropriate for hypertensive individuals. Saturated fat is well within cardiovascular-safe limits. It is naturally gluten-free, dairy-free, and halal when sourced from halal-certified poultry. This food is widely consumed across global cuisines and is a staple protein source in Singapore, Southeast Asia, and Western dietary contexts. It is suitable for lunch and dinner and pairs well with vegetables, whole grains, and anti-inflammatory condiments such as turmeric or ginger for individuals with inflammatory conditions.
common_user_queries: How many calories in a baked chicken drumstick without skin?
Is baked skinless chicken drumstick good for diabetes?
Protein content of baked chicken drumstick
Is chicken drumstick without skin keto-friendly?
Can I eat chicken drumstick if I have high blood pressure?

confidence_reason: Core macronutrient and micronutrient values are sourced directly from the HPB Singapore Foodo database (cr_id F11010011, confidence 0.95, review_status reviewed), an approved primary regional source. Saturated fat and fatty acid breakdown are supplemented from USDA FoodData Central FDC ID 171477 (Chicken, drumstick, meat only, cooked, roasted), an approved secondary global source. All values are internally consistent.
notes: Carbohydrate_g is 0.0: confirmed zero per HPB Singapore Foodo database (cr_id F11010011) — baked skinless chicken drumstick contains no carbohydrate by composition. Sugar_g is 0.0: confirmed zero per HPB Singapore Foodo database — naturally zero as this is a plain cooked meat product with no added sugars. Dietary_fibre_g is 0.0: naturally zero as this is a pure animal-muscle food product with no plant fibre. Saturated_fat_g (2.0 g), monounsaturated_fat_g (2.66 g), polyunsaturated_fat_g (1.62 g), and trans_fat_g (0.05 g) are supplemented from USDA FoodData Central FDC ID 171477 (Chicken, drumstick, meat only, cooked, roasted) as HPB does not separately report fatty acid fractions for this entry; these values are consistent with the total fat of 7.41 g/100 g reported by HPB. Fields set to -1 (vitamin_c_mg, vitamin_a_mcg_rae, vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg, vitamin_b2_riboflavin_mg, vitamin_b3_niacin_mg, vitamin_b6_mg, vitamin_b12_mcg, folate_mcg_dfe, vitamin_d_mcg, vitamin_e_mg, phosphorus_mg, magnesium_mg, zinc_mg, selenium_mcg, water_g): detailed vitamin, mineral, and moisture data for this specific HPB entry are not separately reported in the HPB Foodo database as of 2026-04-16; these fields are set to -1 to indicate data not available from the primary approved source. Glycemic index is not applicable as this food contains negligible carbohydrates (0 g/100 g); glycemic_index set to null, gi_category set to not_applicable, and glycemic_load_per_serving set to 0.0. This food is not a Singaporean, Japanese, Korean, Indonesian, Thai, or Vietnamese dish; therefore no mandatory non-English local-language names are required under G6 multilingual rules. The food is generic/global in cuisine classification.

improvement_actions_taken: Iteration 1: Initial draft created from input JSON.
Iteration 2: Updated ontology match types to closest_parent; added -1 sentinel value documentation in notes; corrected gi_source.source_match_type.
